findings.description: CRIT-301 description (line 28) still reads 'numRuns ≥ 250 (5 cells × ≥ 50 cases stratification)' while the passThreshold (line 30) correctly states 'numRuns ≥ 500'. The passThreshold is the binding grading gate, so this does not block grading (any run satisfying ≥500 trivially satisfies the looser ≥250), but the prose inconsistency could mislead a reader. Recommend the next contract revision sync the description text to '≥ 500'. Not blocking for Phase 3 entry because the operative gate is passThreshold.

verifiedFixes.claim: redLines line 19 distinguishes production code (1 file) from test/config files allowed by CRIT-304

evidence.note: Line 19 explicitly says 'production code 変更は FeedRow.svelte 1 ファイルのみ' and enumerates test files / VCSDD artifacts / test infrastructure config (vitest.config.ts, bunfig.toml) / Sprint 5 既存 test supersession (feed-row-best-effort-dispatch.dom.vitest.ts, main-route-wiring.dom.vitest.ts) as CRIT-304-allowed. Production-file regression list is enumerated explicitly.

verifiedFixes.claim: CRIT-303 passThreshold states bun output as '1901 pass + 4 skip + 4 todo + 0 fail = 1909 tests'

evidence.note: Line 40 reads exactly '1901 pass + 4 skip + 4 todo + 0 fail (= 1909 tests total = Sprint 5 baseline と同一)'. No longer asserts ≥1909 PASS — the breakdown is precise and matches actual bun test runner emit semantics.

verifiedFixes.claim: CRIT-301 stratification verification uses expect.toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(50) per-key (not toMatchObject)

evidence.note: Line 30 specifies 'per-cell run-count を test 終了時に counter object として export し、別 assertion で各 cell key について expect(strataCounts.cell1).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(50) 等を 5 件個別 assert する' with explicit citation 'toMatchObject ではなく toBeGreaterThanOrEqual を per-key 5 件で記述する vitest 標準形式'. The 5 keys correspond to truth-table 5 rows declared in CRIT-300 description (cell 1, EC-FEED-024 row, cell 2, cell 3, cell 4).

passThreshold (the binding gate) explicitly says 'numRuns ≥ 500' with rationale 'numRuns 250 の uniform stratification では 5 cells × ≥50 が確率的に保証されないため 500 に倍増し統計的に十分な margin を確保'. Description prose at line 28 still mentions 250 — flagged as iter3-001 LOW but non-blocking because the passThreshold governs grading.

verifiedFixes.claim: CRIT-300 grep regex uses POSIX [[:space:]] instead of GNU \s

evidence.note: Line 25 uses POSIX character class: 'grep -E (display:[[:space:]]*none[[:space:]]*[;}]|visibility:[[:space:]]*hidden[[:space:]]*[;}]|opacity:[[:space:]]*0[[:space:]]*[;}])'. macOS BSD grep portable. opacity:0 anchored with [;}] correctly excludes 'opacity: 0.04' decimals (the literal . would need to be ; or }, which fails).
